primitives.glass-navy: Frosted card on brand background: white 10% fill, 3px white border, 20px radius
primitives.gn-header: Navy header bar inside glass card, 64px tall, white border
primitives.gn-body: Muted body copy inside glass card, 24px medium weight
primitives.pill: Rounded legend chip with dot indicator

templates.label: Venn 2-circle
templates.bestFor: Overlap, comparison, or shared traits between two concepts
templates.placeholderPattern: Item N, Description N, legend pills with percentages

templates.label: Donut chart
templates.bestFor: Market share, budget split, or proportional breakdown
templates.placeholderPattern: Segment labels with percentages in legend pills

templates.label: Iceberg
templates.bestFor: Surface vs root cause, visible symptoms vs underlying drivers
templates.placeholderPattern: Visible Signs / Underlying Patterns style labels with descriptions

templates.label: Pyramid
templates.bestFor: Hierarchy, maturity model, or priority stack
templates.placeholderPattern: Tier labels from apex to base with descriptions

templates.label: Pie chart
templates.placeholderPattern: R&D / Marketing / Operations style segment labels

templates.label: Vertical timeline
templates.bestFor: Sequential process, roadmap milestones, or phased rollout
templates.placeholderPattern: Step N + Description N down the left spine

templates.label: Header cards
templates.bestFor: Three parallel pillars, features, or value props with titled cards
templates.placeholderPattern: Card title N in gn-header, body in gn-body

templates.label: Cascade boxes
templates.bestFor: Waterfall logic, cause chain, or descending dependency flow
templates.placeholderPattern: Stacked offset boxes with Item N + Description N

templates.label: Badge cards
templates.bestFor: Numbered priorities, ranked tips, or ordered recommendations
templates.placeholderPattern: num-badge + Item N + Description N per card

templates.label: Chevron process
templates.bestFor: Linear workflow, funnel stages, or handoff sequence
templates.placeholderPattern: Chevron shapes with Step N labels and descriptions

templates.label: Icon columns 3
templates.bestFor: Three benefits, capabilities, or talking points with icons
templates.placeholderPattern: Icon title N + Description N in three equal columns

templates.label: Icon columns 6
templates.bestFor: Feature grid, checklist of six items, or compact capability matrix
templates.placeholderPattern: Icon title N + Description N in six columns (2 rows of 3)

templates.label: Venn 3-circle
templates.bestFor: Three-way comparison, intersection of domains, or ecosystem overlap
templates.placeholderPattern: Items / Steps / Icons / All Three region labels

templates.label: Navy glass cards 3
templates.bestFor: Premium three-card layout on dark brand background with glass effect
templates.placeholderPattern: Card title N in gn-header, placeholder copy in gn-body

templates.label: Navy glass cards 4
templates.bestFor: Four-quadrant summary, KPI cards, or compact comparison on brand background
templates.placeholderPattern: Card N in gn-header, short description in gn-body

bookends.hero: No catalog template. Compose creatively: brand background, badge pill, large title, subtitle, author bar.
bookends.cta: No catalog template. Compose creatively: brand background, key takeaway, CREATOR_DISPLAY_NAME, follow CTA.
